body:
## Overview

The registry exposes an automated status synchronization operation for the core assurance entities:

- profiles,
- features,
- tests,
- claims,
- evidence.

## Command Contract

The CLI MUST expose `registry sync-statuses`.
The command MUST support `--dry-run`.
Dry runs MUST report the same final transitions that a write would persist, without saving the registry.

## Derivation Rules

Evidence status is derived from artifact path existence, reference completeness, and claim-tier sufficiency.
Test status is derived from test path existence and linked evidence readiness.
Claim status is derived from linked feature, test, and evidence support plus claim-closure guards.
Feature implementation status is derived from passing tests, satisfying claims, and required-feature readiness.
Profile status is derived from profile evaluation; retired profiles remain retired.

## Release Closure

Automated status synchronization is a pre-closure normalization step.
Boundary freeze, release certification, promotion, and publication remain separate guard-checked operations.

status_notes.note: Accepted with automated status sync implementation

summary: The registry exposes an automated status synchronization operation for the core assurance entities:
title: Automated registry status synchronization
